query:
SELECT 
  id,
  trainerId,
  title,
  content,
  type,
  isRead,
  createdAt,
  DATE(createdAt) as notification_date,
  TIME(createdAt) as notification_time
FROM trainer_notifications
WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 DAY)
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 50;
